question: What specific text phrase appears on the blue background with a red arrow? A. ZDF B. MEIN FREU C. MEIN FREUND IST AfD D. AFD

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A bald man with a dark beard wears a black leather jacket over a maroon t-shirt featuring a graphic print. He stands centrally in front of a large German flag with horizontal black, red, and gold stripes. An older man in a black suit joins him on the right, and they place arms around each other's shoulders. A white ZDF logo remains visible in the top left corner.

Describe the sequence of key visual events involving the text overlay and the second person's arrival.
canonical_answer: At 8s, white text on a blue background appears on screen; at 10s, the text changes to read MEIN FREUND IST AfD with a red arrow; at 14s, an older man in a suit enters the frame on the right; at 16s, the two men put their arms around each other in an embrace.

canonical_answer: The older man holds a CD case with a silver boombox on his lap.
